Executive Brief — 19 Mar 2026

30-second overview for the leadership team

51
Our Active Ads
28
Competitors Tracked
33.2
Our Avg Score
↑ 4.7
vs Competitor Avg
4/51
Video / Total

This Week's Actions

1Expand creative formats (carousel, lifestyle video, testimonials)
2Broaden CTA strategy to include 'Learn More', 'Support at Home', 'Book a Consultation'
3Review 20 low-scoring ads for optimization or removal

Quality Score Methodology

Each ad is scored out of 100 by AI analysis (GPT-4.1) across 6 categories weighted for aged care advertising effectiveness.

CategoryWeightWhat It Measures
Copy Quality25 ptsClarity, persuasion, emotional resonance, grammar, CTA strength. For aged care: empathy, dignity, trust signals.
Visual Quality20 ptsDesign professionalism, brand alignment, image quality and relevance to aged care.
Targeting Signals15 ptsDoes the ad speak to the right audience? Older Australians, adult children making decisions, carers.
Compliance15 ptsAged care advertising regulations, no misleading claims, ACQSC alignment, appropriate imagery.
Brand Consistency15 ptsAlignment with brand voice — for Trilogy: self-managed, empowerment, independence, transparent fees.
Freshness10 ptsIs the ad current and timely? References to Support at Home, recent policy changes.
70-100 Good
50-69 Needs Work
<50 Poor

Market Voice Share — Messaging Intelligence

Which messaging angles dominate Support at Home advertising? Coloured bars show Trilogy Care's share within each theme. Based on 50 ads analyzed.

Messaging Gaps (Trilogy under-represented)

  • Convenience Speed — 22 competitor ads, Trilogy at 27% share
  • Testimonial Social Proof — 3 competitor ads, Trilogy at 0% share

Messaging Gap Matrix — Who's Saying What

Heatmap showing messaging angle coverage across advertisers. Red dots = Trilogy gaps. Darker = more ads.

● Fill This Gap — Creative Brief Generator

Click a gap card to expand a pre-generated creative brief. These are your biggest messaging opportunities.

Community Belonging
CRITICAL 25 competitor ads · 1 Trilogy · 3.8% share
Generate Brief ▶
Competitor Sample Copy
Join a community of over 50,000 Australians who choose to stay connected and cared for at home. Our local carers become part of your family.
Empowering Independence at Home with Trilogy Care
Drive awareness and leads for Trilogy Care’s self-managed home care services by highlighting empowerment, transparency, and cost savings.
Key Message
With Trilogy Care, you stay in control of your care, your carers, and your costs—empowering you to live independently at home.
Supporting Messages
  • Only 26% flat rate with no hidden fees—more funding goes to your care.
  • Same day sign-on and freedom to choose your own trusted workers.
  • Guided by Paula Duncan, we offer warm, transparent support every step of the way.
Headline Options
  1. Take Charge of Your Care with Trilogy
  2. Independence at Home, Supported Your Way
  3. More Choice. More Care. More You.
Body Copy Draft
Experience true independence with Trilogy Care. Enjoy a low 26% flat rate, no hidden fees, and the freedom to choose your own carers—plus same day sign-on. Supported by Paula Duncan, we’re here to help you live life your way, at home.
Tone
Warm, reassuring, and empowering—focused on independence, not dependency.
Format
carousel — to showcase real stories, feature Paula Duncan, and highlight unique benefits in a visually engaging way.
CTA
Discover Your Options
Platform
facebook
Visual Direction
Bright, welcoming imagery of older Australians confidently engaging in daily life at home with their chosen carers. Feature Paula Duncan warmly interacting with clients. Use Trilogy’s brand palette and clear, accessible text overlays to highlight key benefits.
What to Keep
Sense of community and warmth; focus on staying connected at home.
What to Change
Emphasise empowerment and self-management, highlight cost transparency and flexibility, and feature Paula Duncan for credibility. Avoid generic language—make the benefits and differentiators explicit.
Service Quality
CRITICAL 24 competitor ads · 1 Trilogy · 4.0% share
Generate Brief ▶
Competitor Sample Copy
Award-winning care from qualified, experienced carers. Our rigorous quality standards mean your loved one receives nothing but the best in-home support.
Empowering Self-Managed Home Care with Trilogy Care
Drive awareness and consideration for Trilogy Care’s self-managed home care services by highlighting empowerment, transparency, and cost savings.
Key Message
With Trilogy Care, you’re in control — enjoy award-winning care, true transparency, and more choice at a lower cost.
Supporting Messages
  • 26% flat low rate with no hidden fees — keep more of your funding for care.
  • Sign up the same day and choose your own trusted support workers.
  • Supported by Paula Duncan, Trilogy Care champions independence and empowerment.
Headline Options
  1. Take Control of Your Home Care — With Trilogy Care
  2. More Choice, Less Cost: Self-Managed Home Care
  3. Empowered Care Starts Here — Supported by Paula Duncan
Body Copy Draft
Experience the freedom to choose your own carers and manage your support, all with a low 26% flat rate and no hidden fees. With Trilogy Care, you and your loved ones are empowered to stay independent at home — and supported every step of the way.
Tone
Warm, reassuring, empowering, and friendly — never clinical or institutional.
Format
video — to showcase real stories of empowered clients and families, and to feature Paula Duncan’s endorsement for greater trust and relatability.
CTA
Learn More
Platform
facebook
Visual Direction
Warm, natural home settings with older Australians interacting confidently with their chosen carers and family members. Feature Paula Duncan warmly engaging with clients, emphasizing empowerment and happiness. Use bright, inviting colors and clear branding.
What to Keep
Emphasis on quality care and trustworthiness. Reassuring, positive tone.
What to Change
Highlight self-management, cost transparency, and client empowerment unique to Trilogy Care. Feature Paula Duncan for credibility. Avoid generic or clinical imagery — focus on genuine, relatable moments.
Independence Dignity
HIGH 31 competitor ads · 2 Trilogy · 6.1% share
Generate Brief ▶
Competitor Sample Copy
Live life on your terms. Our home care services are designed to help you maintain your independence and dignity in the comfort of your own home.
Empower Independence with Trilogy Care: Self-Managed Home Care
Drive awareness and consideration for Trilogy Care’s self-managed home care services by highlighting empowerment, transparency, and personal choice.
Key Message
With Trilogy Care, you remain in control of your care—enjoy independence, choose your own support workers, and save with Australia’s leading self-managed provider.
Supporting Messages
  • Only 26% flat fee with no hidden costs—more of your funding goes to your care.
  • Sign up the same day and start choosing your own support team.
  • Paula Duncan, trusted Australian icon, stands behind our empowering approach.
Headline Options
  1. Take Charge of Your Care with Trilogy
  2. Home Care, Your Way—Empowered by Trilogy
  3. More Choice, More Freedom: Self-Managed Home Care
Body Copy Draft
Stay independent and in control with Trilogy Care’s self-managed home care. Enjoy transparent, low fees, same-day sign-on, and the freedom to choose your own support workers. Supported by Paula Duncan, Trilogy puts you first—always.
Tone
Warm, reassuring, empowering, and friendly—never clinical or institutional.
Format
video — A short, emotive video can showcase real people, highlight choice and empowerment, and feature Paula Duncan for credibility.
CTA
Discover Your Options
Platform
facebook
Visual Direction
Show older Australians in their own homes, interacting warmly with support workers they’ve chosen themselves. Include Paula Duncan in a reassuring cameo. Use bright, inviting colors and natural lighting to convey warmth, transparency, and empowerment.
What to Keep
The focus on independence and dignity, and the comforting at-home setting.
What to Change
Emphasize Trilogy’s unique self-managed model, transparent pricing, and immediate access; highlight choice, empowerment, and Paula Duncan’s endorsement to build trust.

Action Queue — What to Do Next

Prioritized actions based on competitive intelligence, gap analysis, and landing page audit. 3 actions identified.

high
Add lead capture form to Trilogy landing pages
Bolton Clarke and Dovida both have forms. Trilogy's ad landing pages have no form — potential conversion leak.
Digital Team
medium
Increase 'Convenience Speed' messaging (currently 27% share)
22 market ads use this angle. Trilogy under-represented.
Marketing Strategy
low
Run weekly ad scrape to track competitor changes
python3 main.py from tc-ads-qa directory
Marketing Coordinator

Competitive Insights

Trilogy Care’s advertising emphasizes maximizing funding and transparent care management, leveraging both video and image creatives across Facebook and Google. While Trilogy’s messaging is clear and value-driven, competitors like Bolton Clarke and Just Better Care use richer lifestyle imagery and broader CTA strategies, potentially engaging a wider audience. Trilogy stands out for its funding efficiency message but could improve creative diversity and audience targeting.

Trilogy Strengths

+ Clear value proposition around maximizing care hours and funding efficiency
+ Consistent branding across platforms
+ Use of both video and image creatives

Gaps vs Competitors

- Limited creative diversity (mostly static images on Google)
- Narrow CTA focus compared to competitors
- Messaging is highly functional, lacking emotional/lifestyle appeal
- Potential gaps in targeting broader family decision-makers

Recommendations

Expand creative formats (carousel, lifestyle video, testimonials)
Competitors use richer visuals and storytelling, which increases engagement and emotional connection
Broaden CTA strategy to include 'Learn More', 'Support at Home', 'Book a Consultation'
Competitors drive more actions and engagement through varied CTAs
Target family decision-makers and carers in messaging
Competitors appear to target broader audiences, increasing reach and relevance
Monitor competitor claims for regulatory compliance
Ensure Trilogy’s messaging remains compliant and adopt best practices from competitors
0 of 2 selected

Head-to-Head Comparison
